heading: Navy Reserve Policy Board
label: 10303 Navy Reserve Policy Board
text: A Navy Reserve Policy Board shall be convened at least once annually at the seat of government to consider, recommend, and report to the Secretary of the Navy on reserve policy matters. At least half of the members of the Board must be officers of the Navy Reserve.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 5251(c) of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1661(a)(3)(A)
